title: hieracium sylvaticum subsp. tenuiflorum
intro: Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. tenuiflorum, commonly known as mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. tenuiflorum include its ability to relieve digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Hieracium sylvaticum subsp. tenuiflorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, from urinary tract infections to skin problems.
